en.text: . again: or, when he bringeth again
to the things which we have heard
. let: Gr. run out as leaking vessels
. took not: Gr. taketh not hold of angels, but of the seed of Abraham he taketh hold
of those things which were to be spoken after
.) They: Gr. If they shall enter
it. the word: Gr. the word of hearing not being: or, because they were not united by faith to
they to whom it was first
: it was: or, the gospel was
. rest: or, keeping of a sabbath
on them that are out of the way
. can: or, can reasonably bear with
; in that: or, for his piety
. is unskillful: Gr. hath no experience
. of full age: or, perfect use: or, an habit, or, perfection
, principles: or, word of the beginning of
put him to an open shame
he receiveth them, of whom it is witnessed
. the bringing: or, it was the bringing in
:) without: or, without swearing of an oath
. an: or, which passeth not from one to another
the things which we have spoken
. of the sanctuary: or, of holy things
: put: Gr. give in: or, upon
is, there must also of necessity
. would: or, they would have ceased to be offered, because, etc.
sacrifices there is a remembrance again
: hast: or, thou hast fitted me
. And their: some copies have, Then he said, And their
, whilst ye were made a gazingstock
. yet: or, is yet spoken of
. in faith: Gr. according to faith
. after: or, as seemed good, or, meet to them
be turned out of the way
. place: or, way to change his mind
escape, if we turn away from him
of those things that are shaken
. are shaken: or, may be shaken
: let: or, let us hold fast
with such things as ye have
. have the rule: or, are the guides
